description: carrera has been in the watch industry for more than five decades and they have proven themselves as masters in the art of creating high quality timepieces. The new range of carrera watches are a fresh take on their classic watch models and perfect for urban wear.Case diameter: 35 mmDial shape: RectangleStainless steel case in silverLeather straps with a tang claspWhite dial with branding on the 12 hour markThree time displaysScrew to reset timeWater resistant upto 100 meters
